metadata.description: Kanbantic project management plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
plugins.description: Issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.10.0 completes the version-aware track (KBT-E066 / F318-F320): release→Version rename, known-mcp-tools.json synced to the live registry (12 Version-flow tools in, 4 legacy release-tools out), lint Invariant 5 against stale release tokens, and two zero-dep hooks (locked-version-blocker on claim_issue + Stop version-summary). First Application self-released through the new Version-flow.
